---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a source-linked product, MCP, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user workflow or public-record question should this improve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the page, tool, command, or documentation change.

## Evidence model

What source records, rankings, caveats, or provenance should be visible?

## Non-goals

List any motive, loyalty, intent, or unsupported causality claims this feature
must avoid.
